Title: User Registration with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: TestPass123
- Email: testuser@example.com
- Admin: false
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid credentials (testuser, TestPass123, testuser@example.com, false) into the registration form.
2. User clicks on the "Register" button.
3. Application verifies the user's credentials.
4. Application adds the user to the database.
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User Registration with Invalid Password
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Data:
- Username: testuser
- Password: invalidpassword
- Email: testuser@example.com
- Admin: false
Test Steps:
1. User enters invalid password (invalidpassword) into the registration form.
2. User clicks on the "Register" button.
3. Application verifies the user's credentials.
Expected Result: Registration fails due to invalid password.

Title: User Registration with Missing Fields
Preconditions: User is not logged in.

Title: Successful Hardware Scan
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: - Device: Laptop
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a hardware scan.
2. Application sends a message to the hardware to execute a scan.
3. Hardware responds with component speed and health.
4. Application calculates the expected life of the components.
Expected Result: Hardware scan completes successfully and expected life is calculated.

Title: Failed Hardware Scan
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: - Device: Laptop
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a hardware scan.
2. Application sends a message to the hardware to execute a scan.
3. Hardware reports an error.
Expected Result: Hardware scan fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Missing Device for Hardware Scan
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: - Device:
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a hardware scan without selecting a device.
2. Application sends a message to the hardware to execute a scan.
Expected Result: Hardware scan fails due to missing device selection.

Title: Displaying User Data on Dashboard
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: - User data: Name, Email, Registered Materials
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the dashboard.
2. Application retrieves user data from the database.
3. Application displays user data on the dashboard.
Expected Result: User data is correctly displayed on the dashboard.

Title: Updating User Data on Dashboard
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: - Updated user data: New Name, New Email
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the dashboard.
2. User updates their name and email.
3. Application sends updated data to the database.
4. Application confirms the update.
Expected Result: User data is updated and confirmed on the dashboard.
